title: Command Cockpit Crew Relay
summary: The Quest focus lens now surfaces the responsible bot with avatar, readiness, and a compact Comms jump.

verification.intent: Make selected path nodes show who owns the next move without adding another scrolling crew panel.
verification.navigation: The relay uses the existing data-detail-view='comms' handler for the compact COM jump.
verification.layout: The relay is inserted into the existing Quest focus lens and has desktop/mobile compression rules.
